northwest Korean Peninsula."},{"question_id":"stage2_kp_ne_trough_axis_relative_position","answer":"inside","note":"The 500hPa trough axis is positioned inside the 37~40N, 127~130E region over the northeast Korean Peninsula."},{"question_id":"stage2_kp_ne_cold_core_strength","answer":"moderate","note":"The cold core in the 37~40N, 127~130E area shows a moderate Peninsula."},{"question_id":"stage2_kp_ne_tight_height_gradient_strength","answer":"strong","note":"Height gradients are densely packed and strongly developed in the northeast Korean Peninsula area."},{"question_id":"stage2_ws_n_trough_axis_relative_position","answer":"inside","note":"The trough axis lies within the lat 37~40N and lon 122~124E area in the northwestern Yellow Sea region."},{"question_id":"stage2_ws_n_tight_height_gradient_strength","answer":"moderate","note":"There is a moderate strength height gradient in the northwestern Yellow Sea region."},{"question_id":"stage2_es_n_ridge_axis_relative_position","answer":"inside","note":"The ridge axis for the north Sea of Japan area is located inside the 37~40N, 130~133E range."},{"question_id":"stage2_liao_bohai_ridge_axis_relative_position","answer":"west","note":"The 500hPa ridge axis is to the west of the 38~41N, 120~123E region around the Liaodong Peninsula and Bohai area."},{"question_id":"stage2_liao_bohai_tight_height_gradient_strength","answer":"moderate","note":"The height gradient strength in the Liaodong Peninsula/Bohai area shows moderate intensity."},{"question_id":"stage2_manchuria_s_trough_axis_relative_position","answer":"inside","note":"The trough axis lies inside the 41~45N, 123~128E region in southern area."},{"question_id":"stage2_manchuria_s_tight_height_gradient_strength","answer":"strong","note":"The height gradient shows strong intensity over southern Manchuria."}]}

answers.note: The 500hPa ridge axis is located within the lat 37~40N and lon 124~127E area of the northwest Korean Peninsula.
The 500hPa trough axis is positioned inside the 37~40N, 127~130E region over the northeast Korean Peninsula.
The cold core in the 37~40N, 127~130E area shows a moderate intensity.
The cold core coverage extends regionally within the stated boundaries in the northeast Korean Peninsula.
Height gradients are densely packed and strongly developed in the northeast Korean Peninsula area.
The trough axis lies within the lat 37~40N and lon 122~124E area in the northwestern Yellow Sea region.
There is a moderate strength height gradient in the northwestern Yellow Sea region.
The ridge axis for the north Sea of Japan area is located inside the 37~40N, 130~133E range.
The 500hPa ridge axis is to the west of the 38~41N, 120~123E region around the Liaodong Peninsula and Bohai area.
The height gradient strength in the Liaodong Peninsula/Bohai area shows moderate intensity.
The trough axis lies inside the 41~45N, 123~128E region in southern Manchuria.
The cold core strength over southern Manchuria is moderate.
The extent of the cold core is regional within the specified southern Manchuria area.
The height gradient shows strong intensity over southern Manchuria.

answers.note: The trough axis passes within the 37~40N, 124~127E range in the northwest Korean Peninsula.
The height contours in 37~40N, 124~127E are moderately spaced indicating a moderate gradient.
The trough axis is located to the west side of the 37~40N, 127~130E region in the northeast Korean Peninsula.
The height gradient in 37~40N, 127~130E area is moderately tight.
The ridge axis is observed to pass through the 34~37N, 124~127E southwestern Korean Peninsula region.
The ridge axis is situated to the east of 34~37N, 127~130E in the southeastern Korean Peninsula.
The trough axis is inside the 37~40N, 122~124E western sea northern region.
Height gradient strength is moderate in 37~40N, 122~124E western sea northern region.
The ridge axis lies to the west of 37~40N, 130~133E in the eastern sea northern region.
The trough axis is inside the 38~41N, 120~123E Liao Bohai region.
There is a moderate closed cyclonic circulation strength in the Liao Bohai region.
The height gradient is strong in the 38~41N, 120~123E Liao Bohai region.
The trough axis is inside the 41~45N, 123~128E southern Manchuria region.
The 500hPa cold core strength is moderate in the southern Manchuria region.
Cold core coverage in southern Manchuria is regional in extent.
Closed cyclonic circulation strength is moderate in southern Manchuria.
Height gradient strength is strong in 41~45N, 123~128E southern Manchuria.

answers.note: The trough axis is located inside the 37~40N, 124~127E region northwest of the Korean Peninsula.
The cold core in the northwest Korean Peninsula region shows moderate intensity based on height contours and temperature gradients.
The cold core coverage in this region extends over a regional scale around the Korean Peninsula northwest area.
Closed cyclonic circulation in this region appears moderate in strength from the contour patterns.
Height gradients in the northwest Korean Peninsula are tightly packed indicating strong gradient strength.
The ridge axis is located inside the 37~40N, 127~130E region northeast of the Korean Peninsula.
The ridge axis relative position in the southwest Korean Peninsula region is towards the west part of 34~37N, 124~127E.
Ridge axis in the southeast Korean Peninsula is located towards the east of the 34~37N, 127~130E region.
The trough axis for the northern West Sea region is inside the 37~40N, 122~124E boundary.
Cold core strength in northern West Sea region shows weak intensity.
Cold core coverage is local around the northern West Sea area.
Closed cyclonic circulation is weak in this northern West Sea area.
Height gradient is weak in tightness in the northern West Sea region.
Ridge axis is inside the 37~40N, 130~133E region in the northern East Sea.
Trough axis relative position in southern Manchuria is west of 41~45N, 123~128E.
Cold core strength in southern Manchuria is moderate.
Cold core coverage in southern Manchuria is regional.
Closed cyclonic circulation strength in southern Manchuria is moderate.
Tight height gradient in southern Manchuria is moderate.
